Protected "[[2026 FIFA World Cup]]": Persistent [[WP:Disruptive editing|disruptive editing]]: We'll need longer protection than has been imposed so far ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
/* Response */ Encyclopaedias don't talk about ditching things.

/* Response */ Based on the source, it's not clear who is actually considering changing the format and there won't be any change until the next FIFA Congress anyway. I wouldn't mention it until someone's actually on the record.
/* Venues */ showing football configuration for Houston
Find another soccer pic for Gillette Stadium, because that one isn't good enough.
/* Format */ Correction, format was voted on.  But it is in reconsideration.

/* Venues */ Wikimedia Commons has this other one of Gillette Stadium. It's not perfect since it has both soccer and football lines on the field, but I suppose it's interesting how it shows the difference in field width between the two sports.
/* Venues */ Revised my last edit to remove the "thumb" parameter in favor of an image size parameter so as to avoid it throwing in a caption.
/* Format */ Deleted unsourced sentence that arguably violates [[WP:CRYSTAL]]. We don't know whether they'll announce the format in 2023.
/* Format */ minor copyedit and formatting, based on the reference to Wenger
That Boston photo is OK but that is the best one Wiki has right now. Soccer is often played at that venue, so a better pic is bound to turn up. Also need soccer configs for LA and Philly
/* Format */ replace hyphen (wrong) with en dash (correct).
/* Combinations of matches in the round of 32 */
/* Combinations of matches in the round of 32 */
/* Combinations of matches in the round of 32 in twelve-four group format */
/* Combinations of matches in the round of 32 in twelve-four group format */  Excessive and absurd; a 500-row table that provides no use for the reader
/* Response */  ce and remove pointless list
/* Venues */ Redundant. That’s what a soccer specific stadium is.

/* Format */ 1982–[[1994 FIFA World Cup#Format|1994 tournament format

/* Venues */ not located in the actual city of Dallas

/* Venues */ Changing Lumen Field image to daytime view to make things easier to see at a thumbnail level
copy edit; proper nouns do not use definite article
/* Voting */ Doesn't add anything to the understanding of the subject
I corrected a small formatting error.
I’m inclined to agree with the comment on the talk page. Argentina's title defense hasn’t really begun yet. They get to party for a while!

/* Criticisms */ This vague, passive-voice "crititicized" masks that the sources only say one organization is criticizing, there is no evidence of a campaign like against Qatar
/* Venues */ Added soccer image of Linc
